title: alrawia nutans
intro: Alrawia nutans, also known as sweet white wormwood, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oils, which have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. Alrawia nutans is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve pain, and reduce inflammation. It is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
